prompt: [Reference for person's face and body details] Image 1, Image 2, Hyper-realistic [Pose and expression of the person] A full-body pose standing straight with back against a large yellow surfboard on a sandy beach. Both arms are raised high above the head, holding the sides of the surfboard, and one leg is lightly crossed in front of the other to emphasize a slim silhouette. Staring at the camera with a playful expression, laughing brightly as if lively and dazzled, wrinkling the nose. [Character Outfit] Wearing a clean and minimal white one-piece swimsuit that smoothly reveals body lines. It's a style with coolly exposed shoulders, yet connected with a thin halterneck strap behind the neck as a point, fashionably showing a sporty yet classic beach surfing look. [Character Hair and Makeup Details] Hair is blowing in the wind, naturally covering part of the face. Makeup emphasizes vivid and wide pink blush on both cheeks as if flushed by the hot sun, radiating a juicy charm. [Lighting and Light Direction] Intense and dazzling natural midday sunlight is shining from the upper right front of the person. This light transparently and brightly illuminates the person's swimsuit and skin, and creates soft and light shaded shadows on the surface of the yellow surfboard behind the person, adding a sense of three-dimensionality. [Texture and Color Mood] Overall, it is a vintage pictorial style with a strong sense of unique analog film grain texture. The fresh yellow of the surfboard, the deep blue of the sea, the white of the swimsuit, and the foam texture of the white crashing waves blend together to create a refreshing yet retro midsummer mood. [Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle] The emotion is as if shot with a vintage 35mm film camera, a front eye-level angle placed long in the center of the screen with a wide angle capturing the person's full body and the entire surfboard. The depth of field is set to medium, capturing the person in front very clearly, while the waves and sea crashing roughly directly behind are naturally and softly described. [Background Elements (Optional)] Beneath the feet is a soft sandy beach, and behind the person is a huge yellow surfboard with traces of time. Directly behind the board, you can see dynamic waves and blue sea crashing with rough white foam. [Signature] In the lower right, there is a small Threads logo operated by Meta, and above it, "CHAse" is written small like a signature in white cursive. 3:4 ratio
